title: Alzheimer’s Disease MRI Research
summary: CNN-based dementia severity classification and supporting MRI image-processing workflows for studying atrophy and disease progression.
role: Researcher working on model development, image-processing pipeline design, and technical interpretation.

pageSections.title: Research framing
pageSections.markdown: This project combines dementia severity classification on MRI data with supporting image-processing work for quantifying atrophy. On the portfolio it should read as a research case study with method, artifacts, and decisions intact, not as a one-line accomplishment.

github.sourceDescription: Repository-backed source material for the Alzheimer’s disease research project page.
github.importedReadmeMarkdown: README content can be refreshed automatically during builds. This placeholder exists so the project page remains populated even before the first GitHub sync runs.
